provenance.note: Test fixtures converted/derived from upstream; see tools/parity/corpora/NOTICE.

cases.code: import "a"
import a from "a"
import {a} from "a"
import a, {b} from "a"
import {a,b} from "a"
import {} from "a"
import {    } from "a"
import * as a from "a"

import "b";
import "a"

import "codemirror/addon/fold/brace-fold"
import "codemirror/addon/edit/closebrackets"
import "codemirror/addon/fold/foldgutter"
import "codemirror/addon/fold/foldgutter.css"
import "codemirror/addon/lint/json-lint"
import "codemirror/addon/lint/lint"
import "codemirror/addon/lint/lint.css"
import "codemirror/addon/scroll/simplescrollbars"
import "codemirror/addon/scroll/simplescrollbars.css"
import "codemirror/lib/codemirror.css"
import "codemirror/mode/javascript/javascript"

import x1 from "a";
import x2 from "b"

import x2 from "b"
import x1 from "a";

expectedErrors.message: Run autofix to sort these imports!

cases.fixOutput:
import x1 from "a";
import x2 from "b"

cases.code:
import x2 from "b"
import x1 from "a"

;[].forEach()

expectedErrors.message: Run autofix to sort these imports!

cases.fixOutput:
import x1 from "a"
import x2 from "b"

;[].forEach()

expectedErrors.message: Run autofix to sort these imports!
Run autofix to sort these imports!

cases.code:
import x2 from "b"
import x1 from "a" // a

;/* comment */[].forEach()

expectedErrors.message: Run autofix to sort these imports!

cases.fixOutput:
import x1 from "a" // a
import x2 from "b"

;/* comment */[].forEach()

expectedErrors.message: Run autofix to sort these imports!

cases.code: import { e, b, a as c } from "specifiers"

expectedErrors.message: Run autofix to sort these imports!

cases.fixOutput: import { a as c,b, e } from "specifiers"

cases.code: import d, { e, b, a as c } from "specifiers-default"

expectedErrors.message: Run autofix to sort these imports!

cases.fixOutput: import d, { a as c,b, e } from "specifiers-default"

cases.code: import d, { e, b, a as c, } from "specifiers-trailing-comma"

expectedErrors.message: Run autofix to sort these imports!

cases.fixOutput: import d, { a as c,b, e,  } from "specifiers-trailing-comma"

cases.code: import { a as c, a as b2, b, a } from "specifiers-renames"

expectedErrors.message: Run autofix to sort these imports!

cases.fixOutput: import { a,a as b2, a as c, b } from "specifiers-renames"

cases.code:
import {
  B,

  bb,

  bB,
  Bb,
  ab,
  ba,
  Ba,

  bA,
  x as d,

  img2,
  img1,

} from "specifiers-human-sort"

  A,
  a,
  ab,
  B,
  b,
  B2,
  BA,
  Ba,
  bA,
  ba,
  BB,
  Bb,
  bB,
  bb,

  img2,
  img10,
  img10_black,

cases.code: import { aaNotKeyword, zzNotKeyword, abstract, as, asserts, any, async, /*await,*/ boolean, constructor, declare, get, infer, is, keyof, module, namespace, never, readonly, require, number, object, set, string, symbol, type, undefined, unique, unknown, from, global, bigint, of } from 'keyword-identifiers';

expectedErrors.message: Run autofix to sort these imports!

cases.fixOutput: import { aaNotKeyword, abstract, any, as, asserts, async, /*await,*/ bigint, boolean, constructor, declare, from, get, global, infer, is, keyof, module, namespace, never, number, object, of,readonly, require, set, string, symbol, type, undefined, unique, unknown, zzNotKeyword } from 'keyword-identifiers';
